reviews.review_description:
Go ahead and look at the trailer. Now look at the game. WHERE IS THE SANDBOX! WHERE ARE THE AVATARS! WHERE IS THE PROP CREATOR! WHERE ARE THE OTHER MAPS! Literally NOTHING that was in the trailer is in the game except for the players.
Whoever is developing this game, ADD THE SANDBOX. Also, make an option to disable turning, my stick drift GOES CRAZY at random points, SO ADD EVERTHING 
THAT IS IN THE TRAILER OR PEOPLE WILL KEEP UNINSTALLING IT 
UPDATE: Nevermind, based on the updates the game had so far, its getting pretty good, & also, my apologies for being so harsh on this game, i just expected it to be THE BEST GAME EVER, but it just got released, so i shouldn't be TOO harsh.
Let check this out if this hype or not my type it’s awesome 👏
Toypark's got potential, but it needs more cool stuff to do. We're talking more guns, jumping, and more content
It’s really fun but it’s not as good as bonelab
ToyPark, yo! This VR playground is like a secret party spot. There's some glitchiness too, but I'm here for the vibes.

reviews.review_title: Waiting on BoneLab, stumbled upon this
reviews.review_description: Physics interactions are neat, but it's screaming for more content. I need fresh activities to keep me engaged. Maybe some intense shooting games and the ability to jump...

reviews.review_title: A promising blend of Bonelab and RecRoom
reviews.review_description: ToyPark is a playground for VR pioneers! The idea of crafting your own physics based games is revolutionary. Can't wait to see it evolve!
I can’t hold a gun right it’s crappy not worth it
